Items.Name: Order_Rep

Structure.Name: Order_Rep
Structure.SQL:
SELECT Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub, Orders_Actual.Product_ID, Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Orders_Actual.Printer, Orders_Actual.Order_ID, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Quantity, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Prefix, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Extra_ID, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Extra_Description, Products.Extra_ID AS Pextra, IIf(([Include_Group]=False),[Products].[Description],[productGroups].[Description] & " " & [Products].[Description]) AS prDescription, Orders_Actual.Post_P2_ID, Product_Portions.Portions, Products.Portion_Count, Orders_Actual.Staff_ID, Orders_Actual.OrderTime
FROM (((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN QRY_Order_Extras_Sub ON Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub = QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Order_ID_Sub) LEFT JOIN ProductGroups ON Products.ProductGroup_ID = ProductGroups.ProductGroup_ID) LEFT JOIN Product_Portions ON Products.Product_ID = Product_Portions.Product_ID
WHERE (((Orders_Actual.Post_P2_ID)=0))
ORDER BY Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub;

Items.Description: RecordSource for Report|Order_Test in Form|Order_Actual;RecordSource for Report|Order_Test

Items.Name: Order_Rep_Extra

Structure.Name: Order_Rep_Extra
Structure.SQL:
SELECT Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub, Orders_Actual.Product_ID, Products.Description, Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Orders_Actual.Printer, Orders_Actual.Order_ID, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Quantity, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Prefix, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Extra_ID, QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Extra_Description, Products.Extra_ID AS Pextra, Products.Include_Group, IIf(([Include_Group]=False),[Products].[Description],[productGroups].[Description] & " " & [Products].[Description]) AS prDescription
FROM ((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN QRY_Order_Extras_Sub ON Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub = QRY_Order_Extras_Sub.Order_ID_Sub) LEFT JOIN ProductGroups ON Products.ProductGroup_ID = ProductGroups.ProductGroup_ID
WHERE (((Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub)=[Forms]![Order_Actual]![A_SubO_ID]))
ORDER BY Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub;

Order_Sub_Portions
Structure.SQL:
SELECT Products.Description, Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub, Orders_Actual.Order_ID, Orders_Actual.Product_ID, Orders_Actual.Printer, Orders_Actual.Serving_Row, Products.Options, Products.Include_Group, IIf(([Include_Group]=False),[Products].[Description],[productGroups].[Description] & " " & [Products].[Description]) AS prDescription, Product_Portions.Portions, [Quantity]-[Portions] AS Rest
FROM ((Products RIGHT JOIN Orders_Actual ON Products.Product_ID = Orders_Actual.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN ProductGroups ON Products.ProductGroup_ID = ProductGroups.ProductGroup_ID) LEFT JOIN Product_Portions ON Products.Product_ID = Product_Portions.Product_ID;

SELECT Orders_Actual.Order_ID, Orders_Actual.Product_ID, Orders_Actual.Unit, 1 AS Expr1, Orders_Actual.Post_ID, Orders_Actual.Name_ID, Orders_Actual.Price, Orders_Actual.DescriptionEx, Orders_Actual.DescriptionEx_UK, Orders_Actual.Printer, Orders_Actual.Receipt, Now() AS Expr4, Orders_Actual.Staff_ID, Orders_Actual.Personel_Closed, Orders_Actual.Free, Orders_Actual.Price_free, Orders_Actual.Cancelled, Orders_Actual.Order_By, Orders_Actual.Serving_Row, [forms]![Order_Actual]![PerNr] AS Expr2

Structure.Name: Qry_Order_To_CashReg
Structure.SQL:
INSERT INTO Cash_Register ( Quantity, Price, Description, VAT, Name, VAT_RATE, Order_ID )
SELECT Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Products.Description, VAT_CATEGORIES.REG_PART, Left([Posts_Main].[Description],3) & " " & [posts_main].[Post_Number] AS Ž═Ž╠┴, VAT_CATEGORIES.vatPer, Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub
FROM (((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) INNER JOIN Posts_Main ON Orders_Actual.Post_ID = Posts_Main.Post_ID) LEFT JOIN Price_Catalogue_Sub ON Products.Product_ID = Price_Catalogue_Sub.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN VAT_CATEGORIES ON Price_Catalogue_Sub.VAT = VAT_CATEGORIES.VAT_ID
WHERE (((Orders_Actual.Order_ID)=Forms!Order_Actual!Order_ID) And ((Orders_Actual.Receipt)=False) And ((Price_Catalogue_Sub.Catalog_ID)=Forms!Order_Actual!Price_Cat) And ((Orders_Actual.Printer)=False))
ORDER BY Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub;

Structure.Name: Qry_Order_To_CashReg_resend
Structure.SQL:
INSERT INTO Cash_Register ( Quantity, Price, Description, VAT, Name, VAT_RATE, Order_ID )
SELECT Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Products.Description, VAT_CATEGORIES.REG_PART, Left([Posts_Main].[Description],3) & " " & [posts_main].[Post_Number] AS Ž═Ž╠┴, VAT_CATEGORIES.vatPer, Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub
FROM ((((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN Posts_Main ON Orders_Actual.Post_ID = Posts_Main.Post_ID) LEFT JOIN Price_Catalogue_Sub ON Products.Product_ID = Price_Catalogue_Sub.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN VAT_CATEGORIES ON Price_Catalogue_Sub.VAT = VAT_CATEGORIES.VAT_ID) LEFT JOIN Registers_Base ON VAT_CATEGORIES.Register_ID = Registers_Base.Register_ID
WHERE (((Orders_Actual.Order_ID)=[Forms]![Order_Actual]![Order_ID]) AND ((Orders_Actual.Receipt)=False) AND ((Price_Catalogue_Sub.Catalog_ID)=[forms]![Order_Actual]![Price_Cat]))
ORDER BY Orders_Actual.Order_ID_Sub;

Structure.Name: Qry_Order_To_CashReg_Split
Structure.SQL:
INSERT INTO Cash_Register ( Quantity, Price, Description, VAT, Name, VAT_RATE, Order_ID )
SELECT Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Products.Description, VAT_CATEGORIES.REG_PART, Left([Posts_Main].[Description],3) & " " & [posts_main].[Post_Number] AS Ž═Ž╠┴, VAT_CATEGORIES.vatPer, Orders_Actual.Post_P2_ID
FROM (((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) INNER JOIN Posts_Main ON Orders_Actual.Post_ID = Posts_Main.Post_ID) LEFT JOIN Price_Catalogue_Sub ON Products.Product_ID = Price_Catalogue_Sub.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN VAT_CATEGORIES ON Price_Catalogue_Sub.VAT = VAT_CATEGORIES.VAT_ID
WHERE (((Orders_Actual.Post_P2_ID)=Forms!Order_Actual!PerNr) And ((Orders_Actual.Order_ID)=Forms!Order_Actual!Order_ID) And ((Orders_Actual.Receipt)=False) And ((Price_Catalogue_Sub.Catalog_ID)=Forms!Order_Actual!Price_Cat));

Structure.Name: Qry_Order_To_CashReg_Split2
Structure.SQL:
INSERT INTO Cash_Register ( Quantity, Price, Description, VAT, Name, VAT_RATE, Order_ID )
SELECT Orders_Actual.Quantity, Orders_Actual.Price, Products.Description, VAT_CATEGORIES.REG_PART, Left([Posts_Main].[Description],3) & " " & [posts_main].[Post_Number] AS Ž═Ž╠┴, VAT_CATEGORIES.vatPer, Orders_Actual.Post_P2_ID
FROM (((Orders_Actual LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_Actual.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID) INNER JOIN Posts_Main ON Orders_Actual.Post_ID = Posts_Main.Post_ID) LEFT JOIN Price_Catalogue_Sub ON Products.Product_ID = Price_Catalogue_Sub.Product_ID) LEFT JOIN VAT_CATEGORIES ON Price_Catalogue_Sub.VAT = VAT_CATEGORIES.VAT_ID

Structure.Name: Staff_Posts
Top_Sellers
Structure.SQL:
SELECT Sum(Orders_History.Quantity) AS SumOfQuantity, Products.Product_ID, Products.Description, Products.Price, Products.Product_Type, Products.Unit, Products.ProductGroup_ID, Products.Printer, Products.VAT, Products.Build, Products.Extra_ID, Products.Row_Print, Products.Icon_ID, Products.Auto_Extra, Products.Has_Options, Products.Extra_ID_Key, Products.Picture_Path, Products.Recipe_ID, Products.Menu_Number, Products.Include_Group, Products.Sale_Lock, Products.Portion_Count
FROM Orders_History LEFT JOIN Products ON Orders_History.Product_ID = Products.Product_ID
GROUP BY Products.Product_ID, Products.Description, Products.Price, Products.Product_Type, Products.Unit, Products.ProductGroup_ID, Products.Printer, Products.VAT, Products.Build, Products.Extra_ID, Products.Row_Print, Products.Icon_ID, Products.Auto_Extra, Products.Has_Options, Products.Extra_ID_Key, Products.Picture_Path, Products.Recipe_ID, Products.Menu_Number, Products.Include_Group, Products.Sale_Lock, Products.Portion_Count
HAVING (((Products.Product_Type)="Sale Item"))
ORDER BY Sum(Orders_History.Quantity) DESC;

Structure.Name: Top_Sellers2
